examples.text: فَلَيْسَ وُدٌّ إِذَا ذَهَبَ العِتَابُ وَيَبْقَى الوُدَّ مَا بَقِيَ العِتَابُ
examples.english: When reproof departs, there is no love. But love lasts as long as reproof lasts.

examples.text:
يَا فِرَنْسَا قَد مَضَى وَقْتُ ٱلْعِتَاب
وَ طَوَيْنَاهُ كَمَا يُطْوَى ٱلْكِتَاب
examples.english:
O France, the time of reproof is over
And we have closed it as a book is closed;

etymology.text: Verbal noun of عَاتَبَ (ʕātaba) from the root ع ت ب (ʕ t b).
